recommendations.title: Tree Plantation
recommendations.description: Planting native trees along roadsides to create natural cooling, reduce pollution, and improve neighborhood air quality.

recommendations.title: Median Greening
recommendations.description: Planting protective green barriers in road dividers to absorb dust, lower emissions, and visually separate traffic lanes.

recommendations.title: Shaded Pedestrian Walkways
recommendations.description: Adding continuous shade and comfortable paths to make walking safer and more pleasant during hot weather.

recommendations.title: Dedicated Cycling Track
recommendations.description: Creating marked lanes or separated paths to give cyclists a safe, uninterrupted route away from city traffic.
